versions.version_description: Fully scored play-along chord chart includes timed-out instrumental sections and slash chords as per the original recording.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Everybody Wants To Rule The World

content:
[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Shout, shout, let it all out, these are the things I can do without[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
Come on, I'm talking to you, come on[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]A[/ch]
In violent times, you shouldn't have to sell your soul[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]A[/ch]
Kiss them goodbye, you shouldn't have to jump for joy[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You shouldn't have to shout for joy[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
